description: Denfruit® fruit fillings, produced by NPO Green Lines, meet high international quality standards and are manufactured on various bases: juice concentrates, fruit purees and berries, and fruit pieces. Modified starches and pectins are used as thickeners. The fillings can be homogeneous or include pieces of fruits and berries (1-5 mm). The assortment of fruit fillings is represented by a wide range of mono- and multi-flavors, from traditional to original exotic combinations. **Advantages:** bright flavor and aroma profile; organoleptic properties of the finished product with the filler are maintained throughout the shelf life; competitive price; fillers are supplied in buckets with a polyethylene bag and in aseptic bag-in-box packages, which are convenient to use and allow for producing products with higher microbiological parameters. **Application areas:** Dairy cocktails, curd products, fermented milk drinks, yogurt, kefir, curd desserts, and glazed curds. Fillings are introduced into the product by mixing before packaging or by placing them at the bottom of the package as a 'layer' during packaging. They retain their color throughout their shelf life under low pH conditions (3.4-4.2), provided proper storage conditions are observed. **Common Composition:** Stabilizers (E1442 - modified starch, E 466 - carboxymethylcellulose), flavorings, colorings, acidity regulators (E330 - citric acid, E331 - sodium citrate), preservative (E202 - potassium sorbate), apple juice concentrate, molasses, apple puree, sugar, water.
